ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "world_region" TEXT /* The world region where the country is located */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "literacy_rate" INTEGER /* Literacy rate percentage of the country's population */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "internet_usage_rate" REAL /* Internet usage rate of the country */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the metrics were recorded */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score of the country */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy score of the country */,
  "freedom_of_choices" REAL /* Freedom of choices score of the country */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score of the country */,
  "perception_of_corruption" REAL /* Perception of corruption score of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "education_level" REAL /* Average years of education */,
  "environmental_quality_index" REAL /* Environmental quality index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policy maker, public) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's account creation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policy maker, public) */,
  "can_edit_data" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can edit data */,
  "can_view_sensitive_data" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can view sensitive data */,
  "can_run_analysis" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can run analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
